Update Customer Review
Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) NA > General Order Inquiries

Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding this review. Unfortunately, the Click to Ship team is unable to remove reviews from the site. We strive to be as transparent with our customers as possible, and we encourage them to leave their feedback with any and all purchases they make from Wayfair. In order to ensure our customers are making the best, most informed purchases for themselves, it is Wayfair’s policy that reviews never be altered or deleted. However, there is a review process for egregiously incorrect reviews (ie, the wrong product is being reviewed), and if you feel that this is the case, please reach out to the Supplier Service Desk at supplierservicedesk@wayfair.com . We also recommend focusing on aspects such as merchandising and fulfillment that will lead to a positive customer experience, and the good reviews that will result will certainly outweigh one less positive one! Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) NA > General Order Inquiries

Hello [Supplier Name], Thank you for reaching out to request assistance with the shipping of these POs. I can help review this process with you today. Separate POs cannot be combined and must be treated individually in our system. As an exception, I have manually updated the tracking on these POs for you. Please process each order in Dropship Orders with their own label information. Please note if separate POs are combined under one tracking in the future, it will be counted as a mis-shipment and Wayfair will not assist in retrieving the product. We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Hi Valued Supplier Team, I apologize for the frustration in receiving the emails to confirm cancellations have been received. There is a known error with these that our tech team has been looking into. These emails are from an old process that is no longer used. Currently if we do not show movement on return tracking or do not receive a return tracking number from the customer we do not process a return credit to the customer as the customer will contact us to provide the return tracking information. Updating the return expectations for customers negated the need for our vendor accounts to spend time responding to confirm returns have been received if we do not show movement on return tracking. The system shows these emails are off but we know some are occasionally generated to suppliers and the tech team has not yet determined why these are being sent or what is triggering them. No action is needed on any emails generated to you from customercredits@wayfair.com . I have reported your request as part of the ongoing issue. Please feel free to disregard any future emails from this email address. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best,

Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding tracking updates for replacement parts. I can help advise on this process for your today. In order to manage the tracking information on a replacement part request: 1. Navigate to Orders > Dropship Orders > Replacement Parts. 2. Use the search bar or filters to find the order you want. 3. Select the order in the list to open the replacement part you need to update. 4. Select Manage Order Details near the top of the page. This will open a new tab to submit the tracking information. 5. Click Update Order Details to save the information. You can also manage tracking information for multiple replacement parts in bulk: 1. Navigate to Dropship orders> Replacement Parts 2. Select the replacement part/s that require their tracking to be updated & click Manage Order Details. This will open a new tab to submit tracking information. Using this page, ensure the tracking number, warehouse, carrier, delivery method/ship speed & shipped date are correct. Supplier Shipping and Fulfillment Policy Education
Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) Supplier Self Service Updates

Hi [Supplier Team] I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership.

Supplier Shipping and Fulfillment Policy Education
Problem with an Order (PWAO) SOP (DSC2S) Supplier Self Service Updates

Hi [Supplier Team] I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership.

PO Reroutes SOP (DSC2S) PO Reroutes SOP (DSC2S) - VCN

Hi [Supplier Team], I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To align with this policy, we are no longer able to reroute dropship POs to another dropship warehouse. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order by amending the Ship From warehouse in Order Management; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. To clear an overdue order alert please follow these steps: Partner Home > Orders > Order Alerts, search for the PO and select ‘Yes’ under ‘Order Shipped?’ > Enter the Actual Ship Date and Tracking Number and select the blue ‘Save Changes’ button at the top of the page. Please note: Picked Up (Awaiting Carrier Scan) statuses do not clear an overdue order alert - the PO must be inducted into the carriers network fully in order to clear an overdue order alert. If the PO has not shipped out please select ‘No’ under ‘Order Shipped?’ > Provide an update to if the item is in stock or not > Select a Delay Reason and Expected Ship Date then select the blue ‘Save Changes’ button at the top of the page. Hi {SU Name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out about the status of this PO. As per the email shared with you on April 21st " New on Partner Home: Dropship Order Status Changes ", we’ve recently updated the Dropship Order statuses, including inducted (shipped) and non-inducted (unshipped). Overdue Order Alerts are generated for POs that have passed their Must Ship By Date without a carrier induction scan. These alerts now also apply to eligible POs in a Picked Up (Awaiting Carrier Scan) status. Submitting an ASN updates the PO to this status, but it does not confirm carrier induction. As a result, a PO may appear as "shipped" from your perspective (ASN submitted/manually marked shipped), but will still be flagged as overdue until the first carrier scan is received. To prevent overdue alerts, we recommend ensuring that shipments are handed over to the carrier and scanned on or before the Must Ship By Date. If you believe the PO has already been inducted but is still showing as overdue, please let us know and share any available tracking details so we can investigate further. Hi [Supplier Team] I’m happy to review more information on our updated shipping and fulfillment policy. Beginning December 15th, 2025 a new compliance policy went into effect regarding shipping orders from the assigned warehouse the Wayfair system designates. Orders are routed based on inventory availability at the time the order is placed. To help support maintaining your success while minimizing financial impacts, please keep in mind the following: To ensure orders are routed to the correct warehouse: Keep warehouse hours, holidays, and contact info updated in Partner Home. Report accurate inventory at all warehouses. Warehouse assignments are based on supplier’s reported inventory and the customer’s delivery address. Regularly audit warehouse inventory accuracy and fulfillment reliability. Suppliers will face credit deductions for ship costs incurred when shipping from a warehouse other than the one assigned by Wayfair (including international shipments) that results in higher costs. If the risk of these deductions is not acceptable, please be aware the following options we are able to support at this time: Submit an order delay for the PO until you are able to ship it from the system-assigned warehouse. You can read more information about submitting an order delay here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1440 Select a new warehouse that has inventory available to fulfill this order; please note, this option will result in the aforementioned credit deductions. Please see the following help center resource for more information and the complete updated policy: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3348 We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. For future instances, please note that carrier selection depends on item dimensions. Please ensure the item dimensions are correct in Partner Home. You may alternatively enter a Shipping Dimensions Update ticket to request a shipping dimension update. You will be asked for specific item-level information including part number and manufacturer part number. Instructions on how to do so can be found here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/3377 . Alternatively, if this request is driven by the quantity of items on the order, you can use SKU Quantity Threshold automation to handle this automatically. This feature allows an order to automatically switch from SP to LTL once it reaches a pre-set quantity at the SKU level. By using this, you can eliminate the need to submit manual "Change Ship Method" tickets, ensure more accurate delivery promises for customers, and support stronger fulfillment performance. To request a quantity threshold be set for your SKUs, please provide the list of SKUs and their last successful SP shipping quantity to your Strategic Relationship Manager who’s contact details can be located on the "contact us" page on Wayfair Partner Home, [ https://partners.wayfair.com/v/supplier/contact/wayfair_contact/index ] Note: The required threshold is the last quantity that can successfully ship as SP (e.g., if 5 units must ship LTL, the threshold is 4). We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so please enter a new ticket for any new PO issues so we can ensure it is appropriately addressed. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Kind regards, YOUR_NAME

I’m happy to review more about this process with you today so you know the options we can proceed with on this shipment. By requesting to downgrade the shipping method from Large Parcel to Small Parcel, you acknowledge and accept full responsibility for any additional charges incurred if the product exceeds FedEx’s small parcel shipping guidelines. FedEx may assess an Oversize Maximum (OMX) surcharge of up to $900 per shipment if the package exceeds dimensional limits, including cases where packaging expands during transit. Please note that Wayfair does not have a process to dispute FedEx’s OMX charges once assessed - we accept FedEx’s determination as final. For more information, please refer to FedEx’s General Packaging Guidelines . If you agree to these terms and would like to change the shipping method on this order from Large Parcel to Small Parcel, please respond in this thread to confirm, and we will proceed with making this update for you. Please note that if you do not confirm this change, this PO will remain set as a Large Parcel ship method. Orders may still appear overdue until the first carrier scan is received. See New Dropship Order Status Changes article on Partner Home for more information . Dropship Speed Badging Overview
Lead Times SOP (DSC2S) - VCN

Hi [INSERT SUPPLIER NAME], Thank you for reaching out. I'm happy to address this for you today. The ship badge is assigned automatically. There are 2 factors that decide delivery promise time on site: lead time and transit time. Transit time depends on the location of the customer. Therefore, your products might be eligible for a location but not for others. In order to be eligible for a speed badge on site, orders from your warehouse(s) must constantly and consistently ship the same-day and deliver on-time to customers. Dropship Requirements - Overall Small Parcel Performance Accurate child-level inventory feeds Same-day shipping on all orders placed prior to your warehouse cutoff time 98% on-time fulfillment for all orders 94% on-time delivery for all orders. Best practices to meet our same day requirements: Download orders multiple times per day Arrange for later pick up with FedEx Pull orders through 2:30pm to be shipped same day Weekend or additional shifts Multiple pickups during the day Prioritize Wayfair orders Hourly inventory feeds Note: We do not want you to send inventory more frequently than it is being updated. For items with delivery estimates that are between 3 - 5 days (US Only) away, "Fast Delivery" badge will be attached to the product. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Delivery Promise Education
Lead Times SOP (DSC2S) - VCN

Hi [INSERT SUPPLIER NAME], Thank you for reaching out. I'm happy to address this for you today. Below is the difference between the lead time and the on-site delivery promise. The Lead Time is set in the system by the supplier or by a Wayfair employee and is always counted in business days (5 days a week - Monday through Friday), while the Delivery Promise displayed on site is a customer-facing value expressed in calendar days (7 days a week - Monday through Sunday) . This is why the Delivery Promise doesn’t equal the Lead Time in the system. Please see the below example to understand the difference between Lead Time to Delivery Promise: 480 hours Lead Time = 20 business days = 28 calendar days (weekends included) = Delivery Promise of 4 weeks. Moreover, additional time pads are applied to prevent any unforeseen problem from delaying the delivery promise. Supplier Lead Time Pads are additional time pads applied on top of the base lead time (in 24h increments), used to adjust Lead Time per day of the week & are applied based on order date/day of week. Carrier Lead Time Pads are cushions set to bridge the gap between base lead time and actual performance covering 95% of shipped orders. They are updated once every two weeks and cannot be set up on a SKU level. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you, [INSERT ASSOCIATE OR AGENT NAME]

Hi [INSERT SUPPLIER NAME], Thank you for reaching out. I'm happy to address this for you today. Replacement part lead times are centrally managed, and we have defined shipping expectations for acknowledging and shipping replacement parts within established service levels. Our current SLAs can be found on this help center article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/207 If any replacement parts can be shipped within our backorder SLA: You must delay the replacement part as "Part is out of stock". The date picker will allow you to select any date within our backorder SLA. If replacement parts cannot be shipped within our SLAs, you must complete one of the following two actions: Backorder the replacement part as "discontinued". This will cancel the replacement part & Wayfair will offer the customer an alternate resolution. However, the item must be removed from our website before this option is available. If the item is not discontinued, but a replacement part cannot be shipped within SLA, you must backorder the replacement part as "whole unit needed". This will cancel the replacement part & order a replacement unit for the customer. Our Partner Home Help Center offers further information on replacement parts and the service levels, please see this article: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2883 Thanks again for reaching out. Hello [Supplier Team], Thanks for reaching out. Because your concern is regarding disputing a deduction, please follow the formal dispute process in PartnerHome to ensure your dispute reaches the correct team. How to submit a dispute if you’ve already seen the deduction on remittance: Partner Home > Finance>Account Receivables>Accounts Receivable Summary From here, you can either search by remittance number or PO number How to submit a dispute if you’re concerned about an upcoming payment: In Partner Home, open Finance>Account Receivables>Deductions Search by PO or review your open deductions. Click on a PO to view additional details about the deduction, including the description If you disagree with a deduction, click ‘Dispute’ in the bottom right corner to send an inquiry to the Supplier Claims team If you are unable to submit a dispute using this method, the deduction likely has not populated into the deductions tool yet. In these cases, you will need to wait for it to populate before you’re able to dispute. For the full guide, please see the following help center resource: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2174 If you haven’t received a remittance for this PO yet, please leverage the deductions tool to dispute before the deduction is taken. green location NA Specific Pushback on FedEx Daily Pickups (SP)

Hi [SUPPLIER NAME], Thank you for reaching out. I'm happy to address this for you today. If you do not currently have daily pickups from Fedex, you can schedule your own pickups by calling Fedex when needed as a "Next Day On Call" (NDOC). Through this process, you are responsible for calling FedEx to request a next day pickup. You may find the procedure below. Please call FedEx (1-800-GO-FEDEX; say "Ground Pickup"; provide your own FedEx Account Number and Address) by 4PM to request a Next Day Pickup. You must use your own FedEx account number to schedule this pickup. You can also register for pickup online (Schedule a one-time pickup or recurring pickups | FedEx). Scheduling a "one time pickup" is the online equivalent of NDOC. You will receive a pickup the next day in the time window committed by FedEx. Product must be ready for pickup by the beginning of the pickup window. FedEx will induct the product into their network that evening, triggering a Ship Confirm notification to the customer If you use Partner Home to print FedEx labels, it is absolutely imperative that you schedule the NDOC pickup using your FedEx account number (associated with your physical shipping address). If the supplier does not use the correct address, they are responsible for any failures to receive pickups. This process enables all packages to be shipped within 24 hours. You can also contact your local FedEx sales representative to enroll in this process. As outlined in our contract, Wayfair is not responsible for and will not reimburse pick up fees (charged by FedEx directly to the supplier). It is true that there is an additional charge associated with NDOC, but the weekly maximum fee for NDOC of $20 is $3/week more expensive than recurring ground pick ups ($17/week). Please let us know if you have questions. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

NMFC and Freight Code Requests SOP (DSC2S)

Hi {SU name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out. To ensure your products are classified correctly, we recommend referencing the National Motor Freight Traffic Association (NMFTA) guidelines. Because freight classes and NMFC codes are highly specific to individual items factoring in density, handling, stowability, materials used, intended use of items and liability, referring directly to these guidelines is the best way to ensure the accuracy of your specific catalog. Thanks again for reaching out. I am marking this ticket as complete. If you need further support with this issue, please comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. Products Not Ready Consistently
WDN Supplier Outreach SOP (DSC2S) - VCN

medium info Subject : Frequent delays in product readiness To : Supplier Contacts Hi {SU Name} /Team, We attempted pickups at <Supplier Name and Warehouse location> on following dates <Dates> and the carrier received feedback from the warehouse that the product was not ready. Pickups are generated based on the "Ready for Pickup Date" selected during the registration process and our pickup SLA is to complete the pickup within 2 days of the RFP date. We ask that freight be staged prior to the pickup being executed, to ensure a timely transition of freight. In case the product is not ready for any of the future pickups, we request you to re-register the PO for another pickup date or set a backorder date to avoid carrier dry runs. Please find below a quick guide on PO Re Registration for your reference, more information on shipping orders with Wayfair can be located in our Help Center guides here . Creating Packing Slips, BOLs, and Carton Labels 1) Login to Partner Home and go to Customer Orders > Dropship Orders. 2) Select orders by marking the boxes left of PO#. Note: "Must Ship by Date" is the last day an order can be marked ‘Ready For Pickup’ to be on-time 3) Confirm Carrier/Class accuracy before registration. Note: Use ‘Delay Orders’ if incorrect. 4) Print Documents at the bottom 5) Edit weights, carton count, freight class, and NMFC if necessary via ‘Edit Shipping Details’. Note: For product updates, use the Shipping Dimensions Tool under the Products Tab. 6) Select documents to print (All, Packing Slip, Shipping Label, Manifest). 7) Confirm the warehouse location from the dropdown menu. If palletized, enter pallet count and weight. 8) Select "Ready for Pickup" date. Pickups are based on this date. Register orders by 4 p.m. local time the day before the RFP date. 9) Click 'Generate Documents' after selecting RFP date to complete registration. The warehouse contact provided to Wayfair will receive an email confirmation with the POs scheduled for pickup for the following day each night around 6pm-7pm. Please let us know if you would like any additional warehouse contacts included in the mail Please let us know if you have any questions or if there are any other reasons for the product shipping delay, thanks for the partnership! Kind Regards, [INSERT ASSOCIATE OR AGENT NAME]

medium info Subject : Supplier loading delays To : Supplier Contacts Hi {SU Name} /Team, Please be advised that our Wayfair Dedicated drivers have reported that it has recently been taking anywhere from {Edit to time reported( 3-5 hours)} for the trailer to be loaded for pickup upon their arrival. 2 Man Delivery Service Level
Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs

UK/IE XDP: XDP will contact you 3-5 business days after the item ships to arrange delivery. By the morning of the scheduled delivery, you will receive a text message with a 2-hour time slot. Delivery is to a room of your choice, including up to one flight of stairs. Panther: Panther will deliver to a room of your choice within 2 flights of stairs. Expect a confirmation text or email the day before delivery with a 2-hour delivery window (between 7am and 8pm). They will call 60 minutes prior to delivery. If you miss your delivery, 3 reattempts will be made and they will call you directly to rebook this. XPO: XPO will call 1 hour before arrival and deliver to your room of choice up to 3 flights of stairs. You should receive a text message on the day of delivery with a link to live tracking. XPO will remove and dispose of packaging material upon request.
1 Man Delivery Service Level
Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs

UK/IE XDP: XDP delivery will be scheduled between 8am and 8pm to your front door. A text with a 2-hour time slot will be sent by the morning of delivery. BJS: BJS will send a proposed delivery date via text or email 3-5 business days after the item ships, which you'll need to confirm. You’ll receive a 3-hour time slot the day before delivery and a 30-minute heads-up call prior to delivery to your front door. If missed, BJS will contact you to reschedule. Panther: Panther delivery will occur between 7am and 8pm to your front door. Expect a confirmation text or email the day before delivery with a 2-hour delivery window. They will call 60 minutes prior to delivery. If you miss your delivery, 3 reattempts will be made and they will call you directly to rebook this. WDN: WDN delivery will be made to your front door Monday-Friday between 8am and 8pm, within a 3-hour window confirmed via email. The delivery will be booked for the first business day after the order ships unless you have requested an alternative day. You will receive reminders the day before and morning of delivery, plus a final message when the driver is 1 stop away. They will make 3 delivery attempts in total and you can reschedule yourself twice through the tracking portal.
SP Delivery Service Level
Template is not currently referenced within any SOPs

UK/IE DHL: DHL will deliver to your front door between 7am and 6pm. On the day of delivery, you'll receive a 1-hour window via text or email, including a link to track your order and sign up for notifications when the driver is one stop away. If missed, three delivery attempts will be made. You can request the item be left with a neighbour, in a safe place, or collected from a nearby DHL shop. Delivery can be rescheduled if available. DPD: On the morning of the delivery, you'll receive a text or email from DPD with a 1-hour window. If you miss the delivery, you'll receive a message with information on where you can collect the item. If available, you can request delivery on a specific day by clicking the link and logging in to the DPD site. Certain delivery requests may incur an additional cost. Evri: Evri will deliver to your front door between 8am and 8pm. On the day of the delivery, you'll receive an email with a two-hour time slot. If you miss the delivery, a digital calling card will be sent to you in an email advising on when the next attempt will be made. Should Evri not have your email address, they will leave a physical calling card with you. There will be a total of 3 delivery attempts made. UPS: UPS will deliver to your front door between 9am and 7pm. If missed, you’ll receive a card with options to reschedule or collect from a UPS Access Point. Sign up for UPS My Choice to manage delivery changes, including date, location, or neighbour drop-off.
